children.heading: Awards
children.label: a Awards
children.text: Awards of funds authorized under this Act or an amendment made by this Act shall be made only after an impartial review of the scientific and technical merit of the proposals for the awards has been carried out by or for the Department.
Consortia of entities described in paragraphs (1) through (4).

children.heading: Sense of Congress
children.label: c Sense of Congress
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that research, development, demonstration, and commercial application activities carried out by the Department should be awarded using competitive procedures, to the maximum extent practicable.
